description: Algewaththage Kasun Sanjaya Petitioner Vs. Director General of the Coast Conservation and Coastal Resource Management Department and Others Algewaththage Kasun Sanjaya Petitioner Vs. Director General of the Coast Conservation and Coastal Resource Management Department and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Algewaththage Kasun Sanjaya Petitioner Vs. Director General of the Coast Conservation and Coastal Resource Management Department and Others Algewaththage Kasun Sanjaya Petitioner Vs. Director General of the Coast Conservation and Coastal Resource Management Department and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner challenged a notice issued under Section 31(4) of the Coast Conservation Act No. 57 of 1981, by the authorised person who was authorised by the competent authority in terms of the law, for the Petitioner to remove the unauthorised structures effected by him before implementing the directions given by the competent authority; such notice is given since expenses could also be recovered by the Petitioner. Held – Application dismissed since notice under Section 31(2) had been issued and the Petitioner had never made an appeal against that to the Secretary to the line ministry, and the competent authority is of the opinion that the unauthorised structures should be removed and had accordingly delegated their authority to a recognised agent by the Act.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
